title: premna wui
intro: Premna wui, also known as Xiang Ru, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family and is commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Premna wui include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
